stats.fact: Windsurf Arena Mode launched in February 2026, allowing developers to compare AI models via blind side-by-side evaluation inside the IDE
SWE-1.5 scores 40.08% on SWE-Bench, matching Claude Sonnet accuracy while delivering 950 tokens per second — 14x faster
Arena Mode supports testing specific models or predefined groups (faster models vs higher-capability models) with synchronized or branched conversations
Developer votes from Arena Mode feed into both personal and global model leaderboards, creating a crowd-sourced model benchmark
85% of developers regularly use AI coding tools in 2026, making model selection and comparison increasingly important for productivity
